title: deep-exit

  badge:

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Keep process exits in main or init. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func loadConfig() { if failed() { os.Exit(1) } }
```

## Good

```go
func run() error { return load() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only deep-exit`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
